chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Age at Which a child's Bequest Becomes Valid

text: 5450 - رَوَى مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ أَبِي عُمَيْرٍ عَنْ أَبَانِ بْنِ عُثْمَانَ عَنْ عَبْدِ اَلرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنَّهُ قَالَ : "إِذَا بَلَغَ اَلْغُلاَمُ عَشْرَ سِنِينَ جَازَتْ وَصِيَّتُهُ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5450 - Muhammad ibn Abi Umayr narrated from Aban ibn Uthman from Abd Al-Rahman ibn Abi Abdullah from Abu Abdullah Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as), who said:
"When a boy reaches the age of ten, his will becomes valid."
